# RemotionUI

> Copy-paste production-ready Remotion video components into your projects.

## Docs

- Homepage: https://remotionui.dev
- Registry: https://remotionui.dev/r/index.json

## CLI

```bash
npx remotion-ui@latest init
npx remotion-ui@latest add fade-in
npx remotion-ui@latest search -q "fade"
```

## Philosophy

- No black-box npm component package
- You own the code, fully customisable
- Components distributed via registry JSON + CLI
